name: Deep Fried Tofu with Plum Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Red plums, pitted and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu into 1-inch squares.
2. Mix together the sesame seeds, cornstarch, and whole-wheat flour in a shallow dish.
3. Roll each tofu square in the sesame mixture until well coated on all sides.
4. Heat the vegetable oil in a deep skillet or pot to about 350°F (175°C).
5. Fry the tofu squares in batches, turning occasionally, until they are golden brown and crispy. Drain on paper towels and set aside on a plate to drain excess oil.
6. In a large saucepan, combine the red plums, sugar, soy sauce, teriyaki sauce, and garlic cloves.
7. Add just enough water to cover the ingredients by about 1 inch (2.5 cm).
8. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for approximately 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the plums are soft and the sauce has thickened slightly.
9. Remove from heat and let cool for a few minutes. Blend the mixture until smooth using a hand blender or whisk.
10. Pour the plum sauce into a serving bowl.
11. To serve, place toothpicks or skewers in each tofu cube.
12. Arrange the tofu cubes on a platter and serve warm alongside the plum sauce.
